reasoning: Kaylee McKeown set the 50m backstroke expected world record in October 2023 with a time of 26.86. She also holds the 100m and 200m records, solidifying her dominance. Due to increasing horizon length, uncertainty slightly increases for later dates like February 2026 as more long-course events may begin in early spring, but the baseline probability remains quite high.
